title: stenotus acaulis
intro: Stenotus acaulis, also known as mountain everlasting, is a perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, burns, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Stenotus acaulis include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Stenotus acaulis can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
